title: Donna Fulton
compiled_truth: Donna Fulton is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-17 to 2001-12-03), Donna Fulton sent 46 and received 1072 emails, totalling 1118 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sarah Novosel](people/sarah-novosel) (37), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (28), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (23), [Christi Nicolay](people/christi-nicolay) (19), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (19).
